latest_evidence_summary: OpenNori now preserves language preference across user-reviewable profile assets: packaged Skills route wrong-language Nori Profile and project Architecture Profile content back to profile/architecture Skills; project profile prose follows explicit user language or presentation.language while stable ids and protocol fields remain English. CLI help now defaults to human-readable text, and draft human output presents one Nori Contract Draft with an internal evidence ledger instead of two user-facing deliverables.
